title: gitea storage vars
description: gitea storage vars that can be set

GITEA_VERSION.description: Specific version of gitea to install. Can be a numeric version or an alias.

GITEA_INSTALL_METHOD.description: How to install GITEA. 'system' uses the native OS package manager, 'source' compiles/downloads binaries.

LIBSCRIPT_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Global unix socket to listen on

GITEA_LISTEN_PORT.description: Port for GITEA to listen on

GITEA_LISTEN_ADDRESS.description: Address for GITEA to listen on

GITEA_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Unix socket for GITEA to listen on
